contour_density_scene: The image shows a contour-density chart with labeled regions, numeric axes, and visible reference marks when needed.
The figure shows a labeled contour-density field with numeric axes and reference marks when the question needs them.
The visual shows a contour-density plot with labeled regions and density levels.
The chart shows a labeled density field with contour regions and numeric axes.
The panel shows a contour-density visualization with labeled regions.

highest_density_region_label: Density level is shown by the contour marks: more nested rings, and when present more dots or stronger fill, mean higher density. Ignoring footprint size and position, which region has the {density_extremum_phrase} density?
Use the contour-level marks, not footprint size: more nested rings/dots or stronger fill means higher density. Find the labeled region with the {density_extremum_phrase} density.
Compare density by contour level. More nested rings, dots, or stronger fill indicate higher density; fewer indicate lower density. Which label corresponds to the {density_extremum_phrase} density?
Using the visible contour-density levels rather than region area or position, what visible region label has the {density_extremum_phrase} density?
Which labeled region is the {density_extremum_phrase}-density region? Use nested contour rings, dots, or fill intensity as the density cue.

density_at_least_threshold_region_count: Density level is shown by the contour marks: more nested rings, and when present more dots or stronger fill, mean higher density. Ignoring footprint size and position, how many labeled regions have density level {density_threshold_phrase} {density_threshold_level}?

Use the contour-level marks, not footprint size: more nested rings/dots or stronger fill means higher density. Count the regions whose visible density level is {density_threshold_phrase} {density_threshold_level}.
Using the density-level encoding from contour rings, dots, or fill intensity, how many regions are {density_threshold_phrase} level {density_threshold_level}?

Compare density by contour level. More nested rings, dots, or stronger fill indicate higher density; fewer indicate lower density. How many labeled regions have density level {density_threshold_phrase} {density_threshold_level}?
Compare each region's visible density level to {density_threshold_level} using the contour marks rather than footprint size or position. How many regions are {density_threshold_phrase} that level?

query:highest_density_region_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible region label as a string
query:highest_density_region_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the selected density region

query:lowest_density_region_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible region label as a string
query:lowest_density_region_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the selected density region

query:point_nearest_region_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible region label as a string
query:point_nearest_region_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] box around the selected density region

query:point_farthest_region_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible region label as a string
query:point_farthest_region_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] box around the selected density region

query:vertical_line_nearest_region_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible region label as a string
query:vertical_line_nearest_region_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] box around the selected density region

query:vertical_line_farthest_region_labe.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible region label as a string
query:vertical_line_farthest_region_labe.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] box around the selected density region

query:horizontal_line_nearest_region_lab.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible region label as a string
query:horizontal_line_nearest_region_lab.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] box around the selected density region

query:horizontal_line_farthest_region_la.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible region label as a string
query:horizontal_line_farthest_region_la.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] box around the selected density region

query:density_at_least_threshold_region_.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:density_at_least_threshold_region_.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] boxes around every region matching the density-level threshold

query:density_below_threshold_region_cou.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:density_below_threshold_region_cou.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] boxes around every region matching the density-level threshold

query:widest_spread_region_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible region label as a string
query:widest_spread_region_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the selected footprint region

query:narrowest_spread_region_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible region label as a string
query:narrowest_spread_region_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the selected footprint region
